# Version 4.151.0
> **Performance and engine updates** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers managed-code performance optimizations and Skia m151 engine updates. Allocation-free hot paths in text shaping and color parsing reduce GC pressure in render-heavy apps. The bundled Skia engine tracks Chrome m151 with upstream bug fixes, and several managed APIs gain cleaner signatures.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151, giving consumers the latest upstream Skia engine while preserving the managed API surface. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Two rounds of upstream Skia m150/m151 stability fixes are incorporated, covering rendering correctness and platform-specific issues tracked by the Chrome team. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))
- **WebAssembly build warnings removed** — Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer emit macro redefinition warnings. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor parsing gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — Hex colour parsing is optimised and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, removing the need to allocate a string when parsing colours from slices. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires an unsafe context** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier is removed from GRContextOptions, so consuming code no longer needs to opt into unsafe compilation just to configure the GPU context. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKShaper glyph reads made allocation-free** — SKShaper now reads glyph results through zero-copy spans instead of allocating intermediate arrays, reducing GC pressure in text layout loops. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **SKFourByteTag.Parse stops allocating per call** — The four-byte tag parser now uses stack memory instead of a temporary char[4] array, eliminating a small but frequent allocation on hot font code paths. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Makes two HarfBuzzSharp hot paths allocation-free: Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder instead of allocating, and Tag.Parse eliminates the per-call char[4] array.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Removed the redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule to fix WebAssembly build warnings, and contributed a cross-backend golden-image test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 added allocation-free hot paths in text shaping and colour parsing, SKColor ReadOnlySpan overloads, the GRContextOptions unsafe cleanup, and further upstream Skia m151 stability fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151.0 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly build cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
